name: Wheat Clicker
author: Poki
description: Wheat Clicker is a clicker game that turns farming into a relaxing yet addictive experience! Click on the golden wheat to harvest grains, then upgrade your tools to boost your harvesting power and efficiency. It’s like running a bustling farm, but with a satisfying twist. Enhance your harvester's speed, power, and capacity to yield even bigger bounties. Unlock powerful upgrades and ascend to new heights and watch your farm thrive. Can you create the ultimate wheat empire? How to play Wheat Clicker? Click on the wheat to play. Who created Wheat Clicker? Wheat Clicker is created by We Ballin Studios. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Wheat Clicker for free? You can play Wheat Clicker for free on Poki. Can I play Wheat Clicker on mobile devices and desktop? Wheat Clicker can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
